tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [issues (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"})
      top (apply max-key :count issues)]
  (def top-issue top)
  (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body (:title top)})
  {:sent-to "oncall@acme.io" :issue-id (:id top) :title (:title top) :count (:count top)})"}
